channel.title: GitHub Clojure Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Clojure in GitHub

item.title: penpot/penpot
item.description: Penpot: The open-source design platform for Product teams that need scalable collaboration.

item.title: metabase/metabase
item.description: The easy-to-use open source Business Intelligence and Embedded Analytics tool that lets everyone work with data 📊

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: https://logseq.io/p/NX4mc_ggEV

item.title: editor-code-assistant/eca
item.description: Editor Code Assistant (ECA) - AI pair programming capabilities agnostic of editor
